abort_criteria: Any attempt to mutate Project_ARIS outside a future explicit execution gate.
Any attempt to run Project_ARIS tests outside a future explicit execution gate.
Any attempt to execute runtime, real_apply, Bedrock, product, secrets, or package-manager surfaces.
Any attempt to close IF09-FIND-001 or set remediation_proven=true during readiness.
Any mismatch between the accepted Track A lineage and the future revalidation scope/oracle contract.
